hooks.prompt: A task was just completed. Check if it was an implementation task (code was written or modified). If yes, output: {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"TaskCompleted","additionalContext":"MANDATORY: The dynos-work lifecycle is active. If a dynos-work:start task is in progress, the Lifecycle Controller will automatically handle audit routing. If work was done outside of dynos-work:start, invoke dynos-work:audit now to trigger standalone audit."}}. If it was a non-code task (planning, research, questions), output nothing.
